GITHUB CONTRIBUTORS
Maximize your token potential
Are you a GitHub contributor? Combine your GitHub account with your wallet to unlock full access to your token allocation. By linking both accounts, not only will your token amounts be consolidated, but you’ll also potentially increase your total tokens.
Connect your Github account
Begin your airdrop registration by linking your Github account securely.
Connect your wallet
Proceed to link your preferred wallet address to finalize your airdrop registration.
Bind your account
Complete the registration by binding your connected GitHub and wallet account together.
Learn about TKO Tokenomics
We’re kicking off Phase 1 of our airdrop season by offering up a substantial 5% of the initial token supply for claiming. Buckle up your seatbelts and get your space gear on, it’s time to check if you qualify!
